appMissingHint: It may have been deleted, or auto-start still points at an old app id. Pick an app from the launcher or update the user auto-start setting.
launcher.title: Operator · applications
launcher.subtitle: Dashboards from object tree (server: Operator Apps)
launcher.hint: An application is a set of DASHBOARD objects. Configure in tree → root.platform.operator-apps.
launcher.startersHint: Alarm Console, Work Queue, and HMI Wall — install once, then open from the grid above.
uiNotFound: No dashboards or reports are registered for this app. A marketplace stub install often leaves operatorUi.dashboards empty.
uiNotFoundHint: Fix: System → Solutions → reinstall a full package, or Admin → root.platform.operator-apps and attach dashboards.
uiNoDashboards: Operator UI for "{{appId}}" has no dashboards or reports.
workQueue.title: Task queue
workQueue.empty: No open tasks for this Operator App
eventJournal.title: Event journal
eventJournal.emptyScoped: No alarms for this Operator App yet
eventJournal.emptyLiveHint: The live feed is empty. Check history or wait for new events.
eventJournal.clearHint: Hide visible live events. History is kept.
alarmBar.ackRequiredMissingFunction: Ack required — configure acknowledgeFunction on this alarm rule
alarmShelves.title: Shelved alarms
preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.browserNotifyUnsupported: Browser notifications are not available here.
alarmBarEditor.title: Alarm bar
alarmBarEditor.hint: Popup bar with sound in operator mode when events fire.
alarmBarEditor.noRulesHint: No rules defined — default rule is used (ERROR+).
manifest.selectRow: Select a row in the table below.
manifest.emptyScreen: Screen has no table, report, dashboard, chart, or map configuration.
operatorApps.noConfig: Operator UI configuration not created yet. Select dashboards and click Save{{adminSuffix}}.
operatorApps.chromeOptionsHint: Hide shell controls for a kiosk-style HMI. Add navigation on dashboards yourself if needed.
operatorApps.hideTasksAndEventsHint: Removes the sidebar toggle and task/event drawer.
operatorApps.hideDashboardNavHint: Hides the top dashboard/report buttons. Default dashboard still opens.
operatorApps.savedHint: Saved. Operator UI will update after reloading the tab.
operatorApps.knowledgeHint: Upload technical docs and set assistant behavior for operators of this app.
operatorApps.agentInstructionsPlaceholde: E.g. answer in Russian, cite SOP numbers, focus on safety before speed…
operatorApps.documentsEmpty: No documents yet. Upload manuals, SOPs, or glossary files.
agent.title: AI assistant
agent.emptyHint: Ask about alarms, trends, reports, or your task queue.
agent.placeholder: E.g. summarize alarms for the shift, show temperature trend for 24h…
agent.llmUnavailable: AI is not configured on the server.
agent.suggest.alarms: Summarize WARNING+ alarms for the last 8 hours
agent.suggest.trend: Show temperature trend for the last 24 hours
agent.suggest.tasks: What open tasks do I have?
agent.suggest.report: Run the shift report and summarize key numbers
agent.suggest.remember: Remember: line 2 GPU is the main production KPI
agent.tableTruncated: Showing a preview — full data may be larger.
agent.pickOption: Pick an option or refine your request:
offline.badgeTitle: No network connection — showing cached data
